stories.headline: How 10 minutes of bombing by Israel tore through Lebanon
stories.description: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.

stories.headline: Israeli attacks on southern, eastern Lebanon kill at least six people
stories.description: Israel issues forced displacement orders for 12 villages in southern Lebanon.

stories.headline: Campaigning sprint finish ahead of elections around Britain
stories.description: A mesmerising mix of results are expected after candidates make their final pitches, our political editor writes.

stories.headline: US petrol prices 50 percent higher than before war on Iran
stories.description: The average price of petrol in the United States has reached $4.48 per gallon, according to AAA.

stories.headline: Airlines cut 13,000 flights in May as jet fuel prices soar
stories.description: Airlines have removed nearly two million seats from flights over the month, data from Cirium shows.
